steps.description: Click on the "Message Copilot" input field within the "M365 Copilot" chat interface to activate it for text entry.
Type the text 'how can you assistant me?' into the input field of the chat interface in the bot agent area within the M365 Copilot application.
Press the "Enter" key to send the message typed in the chat input field within the M365 Copilot interface for the agent.
@assertion there's response message send back from bot.
